subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter dated the 12th of the month of Ṣafar, 339, hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ای که بتاریخ ۱۲ شهر صفر سنه ۳۳۹ مرقوم نموده بودید رسید
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for forgiveness, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
